user.title: Divoom Times Gate
user.description: Enter your Times Gate's IP address and the LocalToken shown in the Divoom app (Device settings).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device, or the LocalToken was rejected. Check the IP and token.

abort.already_configured: This Times Gate is already configured.

init.title: Times Gate screens
init.description: Edit the screens (a list of pages). Each page has a 'page_type' (components/clock/off). 'components' pages use Jinja2-templated text/image/rectangle components. See the README for the schema.

error.invalid_screens: Screens must be a list of page configs.
